name: FIRST SOLAR, INC.
summary: PARTI Company Overview We are Americas leading PV solar technology and manufacturing company. The only U.S.-headquartered company among the worlds largest solar manufacturers, First Solar is focused on competitively and reliably enabling power generation needs with our advanced, uniquely American thin film PV technology.
